{{CargoRelic
|name=Maglev Kimchi Jar
|class_id=20037
|rank=Green
|affct=TECH
|source=
|description=
|fame=19
|art=15
|fth=17
|civ=9
|tech=30
|ss1=In explorations, 2x Food Drops +0.4%
|ss2=In explorations, 2x Food Drops +0.8%
|ss3=In explorations, 2x Food Drops +1.2%
|ss4=In explorations, 2x Food Drops +1.2%
|ss7=In explorations, 2x Food Drops +1.2%<br> (Awakened)
}}
